heroSubtitle: Empowering Modern Agriculture and Animal Husbandry
aboutText: Aoshihua Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008, specializing in the R&D, production and sales of feed machinery. Our products are exported to over 60 countries and regions. With more than 50 patents, the company is recognized as a provincial high-tech enterprise.

advantages.title: Quality Assurance
advantages.desc: ISO 9001 certified quality management system with strict full-process control

advantages.title: Technology Leadership
advantages.desc: 50+ patents, continuous innovation to meet market demands

advantages.title: Thoughtful Service
advantages.desc: 7×24 response, professional technical team support throughout

advantages.title: Green & Eco-Friendly
advantages.desc: Low energy design with dust removal solutions for environmental compliance
